content.goal: Advance the TechVentures - Enterprise Deal from Demo using the deal-room playbook, prepare draft contract materials and proposal talking points, reserve preparation time, and update the deal room.

steps.objective: Review the post-demo playbook in #deal-room-techventures and identify the required next stage, deliverables, owners, and timing.
required_evidence: A retrieved playbook post or thread from #deal-room-techventures
A recorded list of the playbook’s required post-demo actions and deadlines

steps.objective: Move the TechVentures - Enterprise Deal into the next stage specified by the playbook.
required_evidence: The deal record shows the new stage
The deal’s stage-change history records the update

steps.objective: Stage the required contract materials as drafts without sending or finalizing them.
required_evidence: Draft contract materials are attached or linked to the deal
Each contract item is visibly marked Draft

steps.objective: Block preparation time for the next customer-facing step using the playbook’s timing and available deal context.
required_evidence: A calendar event exists with a clear TechVentures prep title, date, and duration
The event includes a link or reference to the deal

steps.objective: Generate proposal talking points tailored to the TechVentures enterprise opportunity and the next step.
required_evidence: A saved proposal-talking-points document or deal note exists
The content covers customer value, proposed scope, commercial framing, implementation, risks or objections, and next-step asks

steps.objective: Post a concise progress update in #deal-room-techventures with links to the staged materials, prep block, and talking points.
required_evidence: The message reports the stage advancement and links the created draft materials, calendar block, and talking points

content.objective: Review the post-demo playbook in #deal-room-techventures and identify the required next stage, deliverables, owners, and timing.
required_evidence: A retrieved playbook post or thread from #deal-room-techventures
A recorded list of the playbook’s required post-demo actions and deadlines

result.error: No messages found matching 'in:deal-room-techventures post-demo playbook'
No messages found matching 'in:deal-room-techventures after demo'

messages.text: Maplecrest Systems sent us an unsolicited security questionnaire — anyone know this account?
Week 10 starts Monday. Let's sprint to close! Who needs backup on any deals?
Meadowbrook Tech rescheduled again — Q2 for sure. Marking as delayed in CRM.
CloudBridge legal has questions about data residency. Looping in our DPO for a joint call.
Big W: Bayside Analytics just signed! $85k ARR, 18-month deal. Congrats team! 🥳
Ironridge is back! After 6 weeks dark they replied to the breakup email. Scheduling a call.
OOO Wed-Thu for QBR prep. All my accounts covered — ping me if urgent.
Stonebridge Holdings asked for a multi-year price lock. Escalating to pricing committee.
Terrace Software close call Friday! Getting the MSA signed before Q1 ends.
Wavecrest Analytics asking for a case study. Does anyone have an analytics vertical reference?
Q1 close plan: 5 deals in final stage, $620k at risk. Let's align on blockers today.
Anyone have a warm contact at Northstar Media? Need an intro for the media vertical.
Oceanfront Labs pilot complete — 9/10 satisfaction. Moving to full deployment next month 🎉
Foxridge Capital — legal pushed back on the liability cap. Anyone dealt with this before?
Reminder: all deals >$50k need second-level approval. Submit in Salesforce before EOD.
Sunstone Capital agreed to a 2-year deal at 8% discount. Checking with VP before countersigning.
Can someone share the latest competitive battle card? Need it before my Northgate call.
Just got off a call with Harbourview — they want to move to contract this week. Need legal ASAP.
Zenith Platforms contract fully executed ✅ Handing off to CS now.
Upland Systems ghosted for 3 weeks. Sent breakup email. Sometimes that works 😅
Terrace Software asked for implementation timeline — sending over SOW template today
Stonebridge Holdings legal review complete — moving to final approval. Should close by Friday.
Parkside Solutions: renewal conversation starting. They want a multi-year discount.
Oceanfront Labs is doing a PoC. Week 2 check-in call went well — they love the API.
OOO: I'm out Thursday-Friday. Northstar Media is covered by Jordan if anything urgent comes up.
Meadowbrook Tech delayed decision to Q2 — board didn't approve new software spend this quarter
Highpoint Consulting wants a custom integration quote. Looping in Solutions team.
Foxridge Capital: verbal yes from the CFO. Contract coming this week!
Week 9 leaderboard just posted. Three of us are over 130% — great work everyone!
Good news: Alpine Digital signed! 2-year deal, $110k ARR. Nicely done Kevin!
Harbourview Capital: champion just left the company 😬 Need to re-map the account
CloudBridge Systems is requesting a technical deep-dive on security architecture. Need an SE for March 8
Standup: Yesterday - Vertex Capital call. Today - Northgate demo. Blocker: legal review taking 2 weeks
New competitive intel doc posted in #competitive. Ironridge is offering 20% discount to steal accounts.
Cascade Analytics came back from procurement — they're asking for net-60 terms
PSA: CRM maintenance Saturday 2-4am. Save your work Friday night.
Anyone have a good champion letter template for manufacturing accounts?
Congrats to Megan on closing Thornwood Partners! 🎉 $95k ARR
Reminder: pipeline review call at 3pm today. Please update your opps before then.
Morning all! Big week ahead — let's close Q1 strong 💪

Post-Demo Playbook: After Demo completes, advance opp to Proposal. Schedule pricing discussion via Calendly with the primary buyer. Set up a Zoom meeting for the technical Q&A with the technical lead. Stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft (do not send yet).

content.summary: Reviewed the post-demo playbook in #deal-room-techventures. Required progression: move the opportunity from Demo to Proposal; schedule a Calendly pricing discussion with the primary buyer; create a Zoom technical Q&A with the technical lead; and stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft without sending it. Timing is immediately after Demo completion; the post gives no calendar-date deadlines.

evidence.fact: The retrieved manager post states: “Post-Demo Playbook: After Demo completes, advance opp to Proposal. Schedule pricing discussion via Calendly with the primary buyer. Set up a Zoom meeting for the technical Q&A with the technical lead. Stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft (do not send yet).”

Recorded action list and ownership/timing: seller advances the opportunity to Proposal after Demo; primary buyer participates in the Calendly pricing discussion; technical lead participates in the Zoom technical Q&A; seller stages—but does not send—the DocuSign contract. No explicit dated deadlines were provided.

actions: Identified Proposal as the required next stage.
Recorded the required post-demo deliverables, participant roles, sequencing, and draft-only restriction.

content.feedback: The retrieved deal-room post directly establishes the required next stage, post-demo actions, participant roles, sequencing, and draft-only restriction. Timing is correctly recorded as immediately after Demo, with no explicit calendar-date deadline in the playbook.

content.objective: Move the TechVentures - Enterprise Deal into the next stage specified by the playbook.
required_evidence: The deal record shows the new stage
The deal’s stage-change history records the update

result.error: Unknown object type: OpportunityHistory. Valid types: ['Contact', 'Account', 'Lead', 'Opportunity', 'Campaign', 'Case', 'Event', 'Task', 'Note', 'Attachment', 'Document', 'Folder', 'CampaignMember', 'CaseComment', 'User']

arguments.query: SELECT Id, Name, StageName, (SELECT Id, StageName, CreatedDate FROM OpportunityHistories ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = 'opp_tv'

result.error: Invalid SOQL WHERE clause: Could not parse WHERE clause: SELECT Id, Name, StageName, (SELECT Id, StageName, CreatedDate FROM OpportunityHistories ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC) FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = 'opp_tv'
